---
title: "SCR Data Check Report"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
params:
  app_dir: NULL
  traps_results: NULL
  detections_results: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
source(file.path(params$app_dir, "R", "helpers.R"), local = TRUE)
traps_results <- params$traps_results
detections_results <- params$detections_results
```

# Traps file

## Status summary

```{r}
kable(traps_results$statuses)
```

## Session

```{r}
cat("Data type:", traps_results$session_summary$type, "\n")
if (!is.null(traps_results$session_summary$unique_values)) {
  cat("Unique values:", paste(traps_results$session_summary$unique_values, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
```

## trapID

```{r}
kable(traps_results$trap_summary$session_counts)
head(data.frame(trapID = traps_results$trap_summary$trap_ids), 20) |> kable()
```

## Coordinates

```{r}
coord_widget <- make_coord_widget(traps_results$coord_summary)
if (inherits(coord_widget, "ggplot")) {
  print(coord_widget)
} else {
  cat("Interactive leaflet map available in the app.\n")
}
```

## Effort

```{r}
print(make_effort_plot(traps_results$effort_summary))
kable(traps_results$effort_summary$five_number)
```

## Dates

```{r}
print(make_timeline_plot(traps_results, detections_results))
```

## Covariates

```{r}
if (nrow(traps_results$covariate_summary) == 0) {
  cat("No additional covariates found.\n")
} else {
  kable(traps_results$covariate_summary)
}
```

# Detections file

## Status summary

```{r}
kable(detections_results$statuses)
```

## Session

```{r}
cat("Data type:", detections_results$session_summary$type, "\n")
if (!is.null(detections_results$session_summary$unique_values)) {
  cat("Unique values:", paste(detections_results$session_summary$unique_values, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
if (nrow(detections_results$session_summary$missing_from_detections) > 0) {
  cat("Sessions in traps but not detections:", paste(detections_results$session_summary$missing_from_detections$session, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
```

## animalID

```{r}
head(detections_results$animal_summary, 20) |> kable()
```

## trapID

```{r}
head(data.frame(trapID = detections_results$trap_summary$trap_ids), 20) |> kable()
```

## Sex and other covariates

```{r}
if (nrow(detections_results$sex_summary) > 0) {
  kable(detections_results$sex_summary)
}
if (nrow(detections_results$covariate_summary) > 0) {
  kable(detections_results$covariate_summary)
}
```
